methodology_note: First-baseline anchored apply (-7.5 composite). Five dimensions (EMP, EQU, ACC, SYS, INT) reduced from placeholder 37.5 to Developing-floor-proximity 25.0; three dimensions (AWR, ACT, BND) held at placeholder for first-baseline discipline. Band stable in Developing. No band-crossing. Floor discipline preserves room for further downward movement if DOJ prevails at trial.
